# terrible_community_general_emc_vnx_sg_member (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `lunid` (Number) LUN ID to be added.
- `name` (String) Name of the Storage group to manage.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Indicates the desired lunid state. `present` ensures specified `lunid` is present in the Storage Group. `absent` ensures specified `lunid` is absent from Storage Group.

### Read-Only

- `hluid` (Number) LUNID visible to hosts attached to the storage group.
